steps.label: Unfold the outer negation
steps.explanation: ¬¬P means (¬P) → False. We use intro to assume ¬P and must now derive False. We now have both hp : P and hnp : ¬P — a contradiction.

steps.label: Apply the contradiction
steps.explanation: hnp : ¬P is really hnp : P → False. Apply it to hp : P and we get False. Contradiction closed.
